input.query: I'm building a RAG Chrome extension that explains research papers. I need open-source repos, architecture ideas, and useful libraries.

results.title: paperpal/rag-chrome-extension
results.summary: Chrome extension boilerplate that explains the current web page or PDF using RAG over its content.
results.why_relevant: Matches your project because it combines browser extension architecture with RAG over research papers.
results.how_to_remix: Replace the embedding backend with your own API, change the system prompt, and point the retriever at your own document store.
implementation_steps: Load the unpacked extension in Chrome
Configure your model endpoint in options
Open any article or arXiv PDF
Ask a question in the side panel

input.project_description: AI lecture summarizer with quiz generation

results.title: lecture-genius/ai-lecture-summarizer
results.summary: Full-stack starter that turns lecture recordings into summaries, flashcards, and quizzes.
results.why_relevant: Matches your project because it targets lecture/video content with summarization and study features you can remix.
results.how_to_remix: Swap the transcription source for your own audio, change the quiz prompt template, and reuse the Supabase schema.

output.title: mcphub/repo-search-mcp
output.summary: A Model Context Protocol server that lets coding agents search and read GitHub repositories.
output.what_it_helps_build: An MCP server that exposes repo search + file read tools to Claude Code, Cursor, and Cline.
output.technical_core: Implements the MCP stdio transport in TypeScript, wraps the GitHub search and contents APIs.
